message:
feat(policy): integrate ComplianceEngine into PolicyEngine for unified governance

Wire ComplianceEngine into PolicyEngine following the established integration
pattern. Every authorize() call feeds evaluation/denial counts, quarantine and
kill-switch operations notify the compliance counters, and per-subsystem
evaluation timestamps are tracked automatically.

- Add ComplianceConfig to SafetyConfig with serde(default) for backwards compat
- Add ComplianceEngine field to PolicyEngine, from_config wiring
- record_to_decision_log() feeds compliance evaluation/denial counters
- quarantine_component/trip_kill_switch notify compliance counters
- 6 integration tests: evaluations, denials, quarantine, kill-switch, config
- 3 config tests: defaults, TOML roundtrip, missing section

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
